name: moss
description: The retrieval layer for production AI systems. Lightning-fast (<10ms) search without vector databases. Built for browser, edge, on-device, and cloud.
summaryZh: The retrieval layer for production AI systems. Lightning-fast (<10ms) search without vector databases. Built for browser, edge, on-device, and cloud. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
